column1: # Stub lemma list for development. Hand-curated, ~250 common Russian words,
# weighted toward common letters so the generator can find a workable hive
# from a small list. Replaced by the real OpenCorpora ∩ L–S build (todo #7).
# POS uses pymorphy3-style coarse tags: NOUN, ADJF, VERB, ADVB, NUMR, PRED.
